examples: Avoid the second home, and you’ll avoid a truckload of headaches and expenses.
Having kids means buying lots and lots of stuff, including a truckload of toys.
One truckload is equivalent to 40 truckloads of the already inflated bubbles of yore.
So don't worry if you haven't yet backed a truckload of commodities into your portfolio.
We graduated from college and law school with a truckload of student loan debt.
